title: Symbolism Picture Thread
wikitext:
[]: Symbolism Picture Thread             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat Aug 21, 2010 5:49 am YES. ANOTHER PHALLIC REFERENCE. Now post yours.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Sat Aug 21, 2010 5:57 am In Episode 12, Asuka's right hand is given the classic Shinji right hand flex/scrunch perspective. In Episode 18, Toji - sitting outside class after learning of his selection as the fourth child - is given a similar treatment. I'm uncertain if there are other characters that recieve the Shinji's right hand treatment (apart from the already well-known Gendo/Adam implication). I should look into all the arm/hand implications some time, as it's a peculiar point of interest.

[]: Re: Symbolism Picture Thread             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Aug 21, 2010 11:32 am InstrumentalityOne wrote: YES. ANOTHER PHALLIC REFERENCE.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat Aug 21, 2010 3:45 pm I think that the umbilical cable is a pretty powerful symbol. Somebody on /a/ posted this: If I had to think, I would say the most disturbing aspect of Evangelion for me, had to be the umbilical cords that went into the robots. Usually, one sees the archetype of the giant robot as a means of power or liberation, but the cord turns this archetype on it's head. Instead of being this device that could make the pilot transcend what is normally possible, it just weighed him down even more. It also served to add a creepy subtext of submission / bondage to the show. It also served as an allegory for all the emotional problems the characters had, in the respect that Shinji was forced into this program by his father, so the cord served to keep him in place, and by extension, keep him in line. On top of that, one can look at how nearly every time a character disconnected from the cord, bad shit happened to them. (Asuka getting ripped apart, Shinji almost dying a few times etc.)

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Sat Aug 21, 2010 5:32 pm ^ So umbilical cords are the latest in fetish gear? Thats deliciously kinky.

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Sat Aug 21, 2010 5:38 pm What do you guys think?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sat Aug 21, 2010 10:28 pm One could literally post almost every frame of EoE...

[]: Re: Symbolism Picture Thread             Quote Post by BeoX2 » Sat Aug 21, 2010 11:08 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: YES. ANOTHER PHALLIC REFERENCE.

[]: Re: Symbolism Picture Thread             Quote Post by Theos » Sun Aug 22, 2010 12:46 am BeoX2 wrote: Aww come on, I never really bough that one.

[]:             Quote Post by Sandman » Sun Aug 22, 2010 1:00 am Holy Diver wrote: ^ So umbilical cords are the latest in fetish gear? Thats deliciously kinky.

[]:             Quote Post by Halicat » Sat Aug 28, 2010 9:26 pm Your first image is hilarious. Unfortunately I can't think of any, but I am curious about the symbolism of hands through the series. I wonder if there is a thread devoted to it?

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Wed Sep 01, 2010 2:22 am InstrumentalityOne wrote: I think that the umbilical cable is a pretty powerful symbol.
